title: HUMAN SERVICES - 211info
text: EUGENE MAIN OFFICE HUMAN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Case managers provide comprehensive, wraparound human and social services. Staff intervene in crisis situations with direct assistance, classes, referrals, and advocacy. Offer assistance to women and children in distress, and a safe place for runaway teenagers. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-2667 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 5th Avenue between Adams Street and Blair Boulevard. Lane Transit District (LTD) bus stop one block from location. Services: Case/Care Management * Hispanic/Latino Community Case/Care Management * Immigrants Runaway/Homeless Youth Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Runaway/Homeless Youth Counseling * Immigrants Specialized Information and Referral * Hispanic/Latino Community Specialized Information and Referral * Immigrants Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Hispanic/Latino Community Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH CARE FOOD - MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE FOOD - ORGANIC GARDEN PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - OHP HEALTH-RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MAIN OFFICE
